void_narratives.concept_01_event_horizon: Sound at the edge of disappearance. Maximum tension, zero release.
void_narratives.concept_02_cold_ignition: Frozen textures suddenly igniting into distorted neuro-bass.
void_narratives.concept_04_absolute_stillness: A track with zero transients, only shifting spectral masses.
void_narratives.usage: Used as the [CONCEPT] anchor in the L1 Core (Block 3).

categories.void_noise: High-shelf filtered white noise + fractal reverb (Spatial emptiness)
categories.glitch_organic: Recording of ice cracking / paper tearing + granular delay (Bio-mechanic focus)
categories.industrial_dirt: Bitcrushed vinyl crackle + low-mids distortion at 400Hz (Gritty texture)

noise_library_v2.injection_rule: Mix at -18dB to -24dB relative to Layer 2. Apply sidechain from Layer 1 Foundation.
